title: The Five Hindrances: Ill Will (Vyāpāda) Test
description: We will explore the second hindrance of ill will — vyāpāda in Pali. This hindrance is easy to get caught up in and can cause much harm if we are not mindful when it is present. We will meditate on vyāpāda, unpack how to investigate and learn from it, and explore antidotes.
